default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and B2B content plans.](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance showing positive trends: consistent daily clicks, improving average positions](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Shifting focus to B2B dental content for next 2-3 weeks, aiming for 10-20 articles](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [B2C content pipeline still robust with 100+ more topics available across dental, central, and auto service verticals](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [Plans to integrate time-on-page metrics into future reporting](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Consistent daily clicks, even on weekends and holidays (e.g., 2 clicks on a holiday Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Impressions growing steadily with each new batch of published content](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Average position improving: "Walnut" keyword at 19, down from 32](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Overall trend shows keywords moving towards higher positions (green line trending down)](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)

### Content Engagement Metrics

  - [Jason shared a report showing time-on-site for automotive and central tips content](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Generally good engagement, with some articles showing 2+ minutes time-on-site](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [One outlier: "Clearliners 101" with 24 seconds time-on-site, potential for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Plans to incorporate engagement metrics (time-on-page, bounce rate) into future reporting](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)

### B2B Content Strategy

  - [Shifting focus exclusively to dental B2B content for the next 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1076.0)
  - [Aiming for 10-20 articles to "surprise and delight" the B2B team](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Topics sourced from website agency and programmatic ad manager, likely based on paid search insights](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [Challenge: Lower search volumes for B2B topics due to smaller audience (200,000 dental practices vs. 160 million adults with teeth)](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)

### Content Roadmap

  - [Short-term: Focus on B2B dental content for 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [Medium-term: Transition to 80-90% B2C, 10-20% B2B content mix](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Long-term: Explore additional verticals (retail credit cards, embedded finance with Stripe integration)](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Future consideration: Tackle more controversial, business-related topics (pending legal approval)](https://fathom.video/share/q1iy-b_9ehpLDcyUFZ7fEx8PLGif9DbL?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
